title: Validate that, CNP can process successful transactions with VISA Card.
Validate that, CNP can process successful transactions with AMEX Card.
Validate that,  CNP can process successful transactions with Discover card.
Validate that, CNP can process successful transactions with MasterCard.
Validate that, CNP receives an error message when the CVV does not match.
Validate that,  CNP receives an error message when the Zipcode does not match.
Validate that,  CNP receives an error message when card is expired
Validate that, the correct Transaction Amount is stored in the [Payments].[Payments] DB table.
Validate that, the correct PaymenTypeMethod is stored for the new payment transaction in the [Payments].[Payments] DB table
Validate that, a partial refund is able to get successfully processed for CNP transaction
Validate that,  the correct partial refund Amount and TransactionID is stored in the [Payments].[Refunds] table
Validate that, a void transaction (Full refund under the same day window) is able to get successfully processed for CNP transaction
Validate that, the correct void amount and transactionID is stored in the [Payments].[Voids] table
Validate that, CNP with Wellfit GUID can process successful transactions with VISA Card.
Validate that, CNP with Wellfit GUID can process successful transactions with AMEX Card.
Validate that, CNP with Wellfit GUID can process successful transactions with DISCOVER Card.
Validate that, CNP with Wellfit GUID can process successful transactions with Master  Card.
